name: BANZAI ROYALE

detailed_description:
DO YOU HAVE WHAT IT TAKES TO SURVIVE A JAPANESE GAME SHOW?

BANZAI ROYALE (гГРгГ≥гВґгВ§гГ≠гВ§гГ§гГЂ) is a fast paced battle to become the last Salaryman standing! Contestants must scavenge for weapons, dodge roll past bullets, and escape the enclosing danger zone!
